title: Dungeons and Taverns Enchant Disabler
description: Disables Dungeons and Tavern's custom enchantments from appearing in survival gameplay. For DnT 4.5+
body:
Edits loot tables found in Dungeons and Taverns and prevents them from generating any of the custom enchantments included in DnT. This effectively disables them if you want a more "pure" experience with the datapack and all it's structures.

In their place will simply roll for enchantments already found in vanilla Minecraft that can be found in random loot.

Version 2.0+ of this pack also dynamically edit and remove any potential DnT enchantments from items/enchanted books, once they enter a player's inventory.

Available in versions for DnT 4.5 and onward.

NOTE: In versions 4.6+ of DnT it is possible to generate enchanted book trades offering DnT enchantments via either curing various zombie villagers found in some DnT structures, or via the secret librarian trades added in 5.0+. If adding the Enchant Disabler to a world that's already generated those trades, it wil *NOT* retroactively revert those trades on the librarian villagers. 2.0 of this pack partially rectifies this by making it so any items with DnT enchantments have said enchants removed upon entering the player's inventory.
